title: Law Firm - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
The Murthy Law Firm represents small and mid-sized companies, Fortune 500 companies, and individuals undergoing the U.S. immigration process. Our practice is exclusively in the area of U.S. immigration law, and we work to provide employers and employees with the latest and the most appropriate immigration strategies.
We keep pace with rapidly changing immigration laws and growing customer expectations by locating ourselves at the constantly expanding frontier of immigration laws and integrating technology in our daily operations. Our law firm utilizes advanced office technology for document creation, client case management, communication and internal coordination. This allows us to successfully manage client case work from a brief, simple process to a long-term, complex case.
To serve our clients in an efficient manner, our firm is comprised of full departments to cover the breadth of cases handled by our office. Whether it is an H1B or another nonimmigrant visa, I-485/I-140, PERM labor certification, investor visa, NIW, or other green card case, each falls under a department led by an experienced attorney, who operates with the support of talented paralegals, legal assistants, and secretaries.
Since 1994, the Murthy Law Firm has efficiently and conveniently served clients located across the United States and around the world through the use of cutting-edge technology and other innovations, always maintaining the personal connection you have come to expect from us. We strive to provide each client with successful results by considering all appropriate, creative options. We at the Murthy Law Firm take personal pride in the quality of our work and our attention to detail. The satisfaction of the client is paramount.
Our satellite office in Florida is located in Jacksonville. MurthySouth is available Monday through Friday by telephone, 8:30am – 5pm, Eastern Time. Engagement through MurthySouth is backed by the full support and resources of our headquarters in Owings Mills, Maryland. Contact our Client Service team for more details.
Located in Chennai and Hyderabad, India, Murthy Immigration Services, Pvt. Ltd., provides comprehensive and convenient service in matters of U.S. immigration law to individuals, families, and company representatives located in South Asia. Murthy Immigration Services, Pvt. Ltd., is the only official affiliate of the Murthy Law Firm.
